params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a synchronous memory block with a configurable size of 1024 entries and 8-bit wide data. It supports read and write operations, where a write occurs at the falling edge of the clock when the write enable signal is deasserted, storing the input data at the specified write address. The read data is synchronized to an address, allowing for stable outputs while reading from the memory. The read address can change without affecting the output until the next clock cycle, enabling efficient data retrieval.
